title: fix `proc_arst` handling for signals that are not actually reset
body:
```
always @(posedge clk, posedge rst) begin
  if (rst) begin
    q1 <= 0;
  end else if (en) begin
    q1 <= d1;
    q2 <= d2;
  end
end
```
Currently `q2` is a FF with clock enable set to `en`, while it should be set to `en && !rst`.
